query:
SELECT 
  al.id,
  al.table_name,
  al.record_id,
  al.action,
  al.old_value,
  al.new_value,
  al.changed_by_user_id,
  al.changed_at,
  u.name as user_name
FROM audit_log al
LEFT JOIN users u ON al.changed_by_user_id = u.id
WHERE al.table_name = 'attendance_events'
  AND DATE(al.changed_at) >= '2026-02-07'
ORDER BY al.changed_at DESC
LIMIT 20;
